subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! On this day the Divine Lote-Tree standeth before the faces of men, adorned with fruits beyond reckoning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه امروز سدره منتهی امام وجوه وری باثمار لاتحصی مشهود و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @service to others; to the Cause of God
